creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Reading this loosely alongside https://bugs.dragonflybsd.org/issues/3231> …

(In reply to Laurent Cimon from comment #0)

> … the problem may disappear after a reboot. …

Less disruptively, are the steps below effective as a workaround?

1. service netif stop
2. … pause for a few seconds …
3. /etc/netstart
